query: UPDATE users SET openId = CONCAT('pwd_', id) WHERE openId IS NULL AND password IS NOT NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Vy724JxA6DGk2d.root --database a79tkwusxJ5HWpLxCXSSXN --execute UPDATE users SET openId = CONCAT('pwd_', id) WHERE openId IS NULL AND password IS NOT NULL;
